intro:
Tinder is the world's most used dating app but optimizes for engagement, not real connections. Infinite swipe, unidirectional filtering, and Tinder Gold at $30+/month make it a frustrating experience for many.

Embir offers intentional, bidirectional matching for free for core connections.

comparisonTable.embir: Full features core connection features are free

sections.title: Why choose Embir over Tinder?
sections.content: Tinder suffers from an aggressive paywall and unidirectional orientation filtering. Embir solves these limitations with deep compatibility matching, verified profiles, and bidirectional filtering that truly respects your orientation both ways.
highlights: Bidirectional filtering — your orientation applies both ways
Verified profiles — fewer bots and fake accounts
Core connection features are free — no credit card required

verdict: If you use Tinder and want an alternative that better respects your orientation, verifies profiles, and is free — Embir is the best option in 2026.
ctaText: Try Embir free — the best Tinder alternative

faq.a: Embir has verified profiles, bidirectional filtering and reporting and blocking that Tinder doesn't offer. For LGBTQ+ inclusivity and safety, Embir is superior.
Yes. Discovery, matching and messaging are free for core connections.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Tinder for LGBTQ+ dating?
faq.a: Embir was built from scratch for all orientations. Tinder added LGBTQ+ support gradually with often insufficient filtering.
